payload.reason: Victor updated Builder Console task status with grounded evidence and governance approval.

request.query: What is the next grounded reflection for the active governed automation task "Build prompt-construction operations display" in phase "Comms Tab Prompt Automation"?

groundedContext.query: What is the next grounded reflection for the active governed automation task "Build prompt-construction operations display" in phase "Comms Tab Prompt Automation"?
semanticNodeLabels: Automate prompt-building inside the comms tab so the user experience collapses to standard chat input/output plus a compact operations display showing prompt construction in real time.
The resulting architecture is ready for Victor-mediated automation under Builder Console governance.
A compact operations display shows prompt construction/provenance in real time.
Prompt-building controls are removed from the main visible surface.
Reduce comms tab to standard chat I/O

before.title: Build prompt-construction operations display
before.description: Implement the compact operations panel that streams prompt-construction steps, provenance, and system state without overwhelming the main chat input/output surface.
acceptance: The operations display shows prompt-construction steps in real time.
Provenance or system-state details are visible without taking over the primary chat surface.
The display consumes structured backend prompt-construction events rather than reconstructing state in the UI.
The resulting interface stays aligned with Victor-mediated governed automation.
